name: X-Golf Hudson
about: X-Golf Hudson is an indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators that provide a realistic and accurate golf experience. The venue offers simulator time by the hour, with each bay accommodating up to six people, making it suitable for both individual practice and group play. Alongside golf, the facility includes a full-service restaurant and bar, a space for hosting corporate events and parties, and opportunities for leagues and lessons with PGA-certified instructors. It operates with extended hours throughout the week, designed to offer a flexible, modern golf entertainment option year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: The world's most accurate indoor golf simulators with advanced camera, laser, and impact sensor technology
Casual and welcoming atmosphere with a full bar and restaurant for a complete entertainment experience
Accommodates all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, with PGA-certified coaching available

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a menu including shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas.
Full bar service with beer on tap or by the glass, cocktails, and wines.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rentals are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about one hour for one person to complete 18 holes. For each additional person, you should plan for an extra hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Hudson.
